title: Cobblemon WTBIT
description: WTBIT (What the Berry is That) is a Cobblemon resource-pack that adds berry names for block IDs, such as replacing block.cobblemon.oran_berry with Oran Berry, so that berry tree blocks display properly in WTHIT (What the Hell is That)
body:
Cobblemon WTBIT (What the Berry is That) is a [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) resource-pack that adds berry names for block IDs, such as replacing block.cobblemon.oran_berry with Oran Berry, so that berry tree blocks display properly. It was made to correct the names that display in the [WTHIT (What the Hell is That)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wthit) mod, therefore if you are not intending not to play with block identification mods like [WTHIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/wthit) or [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) there is no use for this pack.

![Before and After tool tip from WTHIT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb624513409e02bbefcb529077c1c506f6fbd1ef.png)

Currently the pack is only in English, if there is demand the pack can be expanded to more languages. There will most likly not be future development on this resource pack only updates for future missing block ids. Any development will most likly come in the form of a data pack or side mod to integrate more features of [WTHIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/wthit) with Cobblemon

Dependencies: 
- [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)

Compatibilities:
- [WTHIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/wthit)
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)
________________________________________________________________________________________________

Feedback and Support: [Cobblemon WTBIT Feedback & Bug Support](https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1326806901102739536) in the Cobblemon Discord Server
